analysis.llm_summary: Top picks are from the candidate shortlist with highest scores, aligning well with frequent digits in key positions such as 4, 6, 2 in position 1 and 9, 2, 6 in position 5. The top5 form the strongest subset of the top50, reflecting both score ranking and digit frequency trends from recent draws.
